English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Stereoscopic views 6541
1.6 cubic feet. 1.6 cubic feet.
[between 1865 between 1920] Photographs Stereoscopic views: chiefly Cornell University views and buildings; Ithaca area views, architecture, and waterfalls and glens; New York State, Pennsylvania, Massachusetts, Minnesota, California, Wisconsin, West Virginia and Vermont views, industry, and architecture. There are a few views of Switzerland and France as well. Also four cabinet cards featuring scenes from Fall Creek, Ithaca. Collection material in English 4732713
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Julia Parker
Date completed:
November 2003
EAD encoding:
Julia Parker
Cite As:
Stereoscopic views, #6541. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scope and content
Stereoscopic views: chiefly Cornell University views and buildings; Ithaca area views, architecture, and waterfalls and glens; New York State, Pennsylvania, Massachusetts, Minnesota, California, Illinois, New Hampshire, Wisconsin, West Virginia and Vermont views, industry, and architecture (interiors and exteriors). There are a few views of Italy, Martinique, Palestine, Scotland, Switzerland and France as well as humor, children's story characters, and other miscellaneous subjects. Also four cabinet cards featuring scenes from Fall Creek, Ithaca.
Stereoscopic photographs. Cabinet photographs. Wisconsin -- Pictorial works. West Virginia -- Pictorial works. Vermont -- Pictorial works. Switzerland -- Pictorial works. Scotland -- Pictorial works. Pennsylvania -- Pictorial works. Palestine -- Pictorial works. Ithaca (N.Y.) -- Pictorial works. New Hampshire -- Pictorial works. Minnesota -- Pictorial works. Massachusetts -- Pictorial works. Martinique -- Pictorial works. Italy -- Pictorial works. Illinois -- Pictorial works. France -- Pictorial works. California -- Pictorial works.
